constituents: Pleiarina acmophylla contains a variety of active constituents, including alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. Research has identified several bioactive compounds, including acmoflavone and acmophenone, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The exact composition of the plant's active constituents can vary depending on the source and method of extraction. Further studies are needed to fully understand the pharmacological effects of Pleiarina acmophylla's active constituents.
